programmes.show_name: Get It On with Bryan Burnett
programmes.show_description: It's the songs where the backing vocals are the star. From God Only Knows to Like a Prayer, Elvis to the Beatles, which songs had the best backing vocals?
A chance to hear Hamish Hawk making his debut on the show in 2023, playing songs from his album Angel Numbers, plus music & gig news from Heaven 17, Arlo Parks, Robyn & Starsailor.
The best company to end the day, with lively chat and some of your favourite tunes.

programmes.show_name: Get It On with Bryan Burnett
programmes.show_description: What song sums up your day? Were you Shopping with the Pet Shop Boys, maybe you've just had a bit of a Bad Day, or was it a sneaky day off enjoying nothing more than Coffee and TV?
